# Dr Rob Firth

> AI Researcher · Hartree Centre, STFC

AI researcher and certified data ethics professional based at the STFC Hartree Centre. Background in astrophysics (PhD, University of Southampton). Working on applied NLP, responsible AI, and AI for science.

## Pages

- [Home](https://robertfirth.co.uk/): Bio and areas of focus
- [Interests](https://robertfirth.co.uk/interests/): Research interests in detail
- [Contact](https://robertfirth.co.uk/contact/): Contact details and social links

## Areas of Focus

### Ethical AI & Responsible Innovation
Certified Data Ethics Professional (ODI). Thinks carefully about responsible AI deployment — training data provenance, model transparency, and societal impact. This shapes every project.

### NLP & Large Language Models
Applied NLP and large language models for technical domains, including document processing and information extraction at scale on HPC platforms.

### AI for Science
Co-initiated the Intelligent Observatory programme with the South African Astronomical Observatory, applying AI to automate and improve telescope operations.

### Astrophysics
Former supernova researcher. PhD at the University of Southampton focused on Type Ia supernovae — thermonuclear explosions used as standard candles in cosmology.

### Open Source & Software
Python developer since PhD. Cares about well-tested, well-documented code and the tooling that makes research software sustainable.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/RobFirth
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robfirth

- Email: contact@robertfirth.co.uk
- Intelligent Observatory (UKRI): https://www.ukri.org/news/uk-south-africa-partnership-uses-ai-to-make-telescopes-smarter/
